title: Kathmandu Valley Rim (KVR) Trail
author: Admin
full_content: The Kathmandu Valley Rim (KVR), officially known as the Manjushree Trail, is Nepal’s most iconic long-distance trail encircling the Kathmandu Valley. This 165km route offers runners a mix of technical ridges, lush forests, and deep cultural immersion. It serves as the primary course for the Manjushree Trail Race. The trail provides breathtaking views of the Ganesh, Langtang, and Jugal Himal ranges while passing through historical sites and remote villages just a few miles from the capital city.

seo.meta_title: Kathmandu Valley Rim (KVR) Trail Guide | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Everything you need to know about the 165km Manjushree Trail encircling the Kathmandu Valley.

title: Fast-packing and Trail Running in Pokhara
author: Admin
full_content: Pokhara is a world-class destination for fast-packing and trail running. With its proximity to the Annapurna range and a variety of low-to-mid altitude ridges, it offers terrain suitable for all skill levels. Popular routes include the Sarangkot-Naudanda ridge and the trails around Phewa Lake. Trailmandu organizes specific training camps and guided fast-packing trips in this region to help runners acclimate and build endurance before heading into the higher Himalayas.

seo.meta_title: Fast-packing & Trail Running in Pokhara | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Explore the best trail running routes in Pokhara, the gateway to the Annapurnas.

title: Sindhupalchowk International Trail Race 2026
author: Admin
full_content: Join the 10th Sindhupalchok International Trail Race on January 24, 2026. This landmark event features a 60km ultra and a 28km trail race. Known for its challenging vertical gain and high-altitude scenery, the race takes participants through the rugged beauty of the Sindhupalchok district. It is a premier event for both local elite athletes and international runners looking to test their limits in the Nepalese hills.

seo.meta_title: Sindhupalchowk International Trail Race 2026 | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Registration details and race information for the 10th Sindhupalchowk International Trail Race.

title: Trail Running in Nepal
author: Admin
full_content: Nepal is more than the land of trekking and mountaineering—it is one of the world’s most exciting and untapped destinations for trail running. From the low-altitude sub-tropical forests to the high-alpine glaciated passes, the diversity is unmatched. Trailmandu works to promote these trails globally, focusing on athlete development and sustainable sports tourism. Whether it's a weekend run in the valley or a multi-day fast-packing expedition, Nepal offers an unparalleled paradise for runners.

seo.meta_title: Trail Running in Nepal - The Ultimate Guide | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Discover why Nepal is the ultimate destination for trail runners and endurance athletes.

title: Trailmandu Hydration Vest for Trail runners in Nepal
author: Admin
full_content: Trailmandu has created Nepal’s first-ever hydration vest designed specifically for trail runners. Understanding the unique needs of Himalayan running—where vertical gain is high and weather is unpredictable—we developed a vest that balances weight, accessibility, and durability. This local innovation supports the growing community of runners by providing high-quality gear tailored to the local environment.

seo.meta_title: Trailmandu Hydration Vest - Nepal’s First Running Vest | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Details on the first hydration vest designed and manufactured specifically for Nepal's trail running conditions.

title: Manjushree Trail Race
author: Admin
full_content: The Manjushree Trail Race (MTR) has become one of Nepal’s most defining ultra-endurance events—a powerful blend of rugged Himalayan landscapes, historical footpaths, and a trail-running community driven by passion. The race covers various distances including the full 100-miler around the valley rim. It is not just a race but a celebration of the ancient trails that have connected the valley's hills for centuries.

seo.meta_title: Manjushree Trail Race (MTR) - Ultra Endurance Nepal | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Information on the Manjushree Trail Race, featuring the 100-mile ultra around the Kathmandu Valley Rim.

title: Tenzing-Hillary Everest Marathon with Trailmandu
author: Admin
full_content: Join Trailmandu for the Tenzing-Hillary Everest Marathon and make your dream of running the world’s highest marathon a reality. Starting from Everest Base Camp (5,364m) and finishing in Namche Bazaar, this race is a ultimate test of high-altitude endurance. Trailmandu provides specialized coaching and fast-packing logistics to ensure runners are fully acclimated and prepared for the technical descent.

seo.meta_title: Run the Everest Marathon with Trailmandu | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Expert logistics and training for the world's highest marathon starting from Everest Base Camp.

title: Fastpacking the Himalaya with Rashila Tamang
author: Admin
full_content: Join Asia Trail Master Champion Rashila Tamang and Trailmandu for a fast-packing adventure through Nepal’s Himalaya. Run light, move fast, and explore iconic trails with one of Asia’s top trail runners. This adventure is designed for those looking to learn from the best while navigating technical terrains and high-altitude passes. Rashila shares her expertise in pacing, nutrition, and mountain safety, making this a unique opportunity for aspiring trail runners to gain elite-level insights while experiencing the raw beauty of the Himalayas.

seo.meta_title: Fastpacking the Himalaya with Rashila Tamang | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Run with a champion. Join Rashila Tamang for an elite fast-packing experience in the heart of Nepal's mountains.

title: Annapurna Base Camp Fast-packing
author: Admin
full_content: Fast-packing Annapurna Base Camp (ABC) compresses a 7–10 day trek into just 4 running days. Itinerary: Day 1: Fly to Pokhara, drive to Jhinu, run to Upper Sinuwa (12km). Day 2: Upper Sinuwa to Deurali (18km) through moss-covered forests. Day 3: Push to ABC (4,130m) via Machhapuchhre Base Camp, then descend to Bamboo (24km total). Day 4: Return to Jhinu, dip in hot springs, and fly back to Kathmandu. This route offers a pure blend of endurance and mountain magic, moving through subtropical forests to glacial basins with light packs.

seo.meta_title: Annapurna Base Camp Fast-packing - 4 Day Guide | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: The ultimate guide to fast-packing ABC in 4 days. Includes itinerary, elevation details, and gear tips.

title: Pikey Peak Fastpacking
author: Admin
full_content: The Pikey Peak Run is a hidden gem in the lower Solu-Khumbu region. Highlights include 360° views of Everest, Lhotse, and Makalu from Pikey Peak (4,065m). The route starts in Dhap (accessible by Jeep) and passes through Sherpa villages like Jhapre and Junbesi, ending with a flowy descent to Phaplu. It is an ideal self-supported adventure or training expedition for longer Himalayan ultras, featuring ancient monasteries like Thupten Choling and tranquil rhododendron forests without the typical EBC crowds.

seo.meta_title: Pikey Peak Fastpacking - The Best Everest View Run | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Explore the Pikey Peak trail, a wild and cultural high-altitude run offering the best sunrise views of Everest.

title: Sunmaya Budha Wins Silver at 2025 World Trail Running Championship
author: Admin
full_content: Nepal's Sunmaya Budha made history by winning silver at the 2025 World Mountain & Trail Running Championships in Spain. Competing against 1,700 runners, she finished the 82km Long Trail race in 10 hours 23 minutes, placing just behind winner Katie Schide. Hailing from Jumla, Sunmaya's achievement is a milestone for Nepal, proving that local athletes can dominate on the world stage. Her success serves as an inspiration for the next generation of Himalayan trail runners.

seo.meta_title: Sunmaya Budha Wins Silver - 2025 World Championships | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Historic silver medal for Nepal's Sunmaya Budha at the World Mountain & Trail Running Championships in Spain.

title: Fastpacking to Everest Base Camp From Pikey Peak
author: Admin
full_content: This route connects the peaceful ridges of Solu with the legendary trails of Khumbu. Starting from Pikey Peak, runners traverse through high-altitude terrain to reach Everest Base Camp. It is a challenging journey that avoids the typical flight to Lukla by utilizing ground transport to Dhap. The path offers a unique transition from Sherpa cultural heartlands to the rugged glacial environment of the high Everest region, emphasizing self-sufficiency and speed.

seo.meta_title: Fastpacking to EBC From Pikey Peak | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: A scenic and rewarding Himalayan route connecting Pikey Peak to Everest Base Camp for endurance runners.

title: Fastpacking the Manaslu Circuit
author: Admin
full_content: Fastpacking the Manaslu Circuit — where endurance meets exploration on Nepal’s wildest mountain trail. Light pack, big miles, and pure Himalayan freedom — this is adventure beyond ordinary. This route circles Mount Manaslu, the world's eighth-highest peak, taking runners through a remote region with unique Tibetan-influenced culture. Known for its rugged beauty and authentic immersion, it is a premier choice for those seeking a less-crowded alternative to the Annapurna circuit.

seo.meta_title: Fastpacking the Manaslu Circuit | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Experience the ultimate speed-trekking adventure around the world's 8th highest peak, Mount Manaslu.

title: Tamang Heritage Fastpacking
author: Admin
full_content: The Tamang Heritage Trail fastpacking adventure is one of the most rewarding off-the-beaten-path experiences in Nepal's Langtang region. Designed for fastpackers who want to combine endurance with cultural immersion, this route offers a rare chance to move quickly through scenic Himalayan landscapes while discovering the unique traditions of the Tamang people. The trail passes through traditional villages like Gatlang, Briddim, and Thuman, offering constant views of Ganesh Himal and the Langtang range. This journey can be combined with the Singla Pass or Gosainkunda Trail for a longer expedition.

seo.meta_title: Tamang Heritage Fastpacking - Cultural Trail Run | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: A cultural fastpacking journey through the Langtang region, exploring Tamang villages and high-altitude meadows.

title: Mardi Himal Fastpacking
author: Admin
full_content: The Mardi Himal Trek is one of the most scenic and less crowded trails in the Annapurna region. For trail runners, this 4-day itinerary (Kathmandu to Kathmandu) is ideal for a fast-paced adventure reaching 4,200m at Mardi Himal Base Camp. Total distance is approximately 40km with 2,750m of elevation gain. The terrain shifts from jungle singletracks to ridgeline runs with close-up views of Machhapuchhre (Fishtail) and Annapurna South. Accommodation is in local tea houses, allowing runners to travel light without camping gear.

seo.meta_title: Mardi Himal Fastpacking - 4 Day Itinerary | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: A compact 4-day trail running adventure to Mardi Himal Base Camp (4,200m) in the Annapurna region.

title: Fastpacking in Kathmandu Valley
author: Admin
full_content: For trail runners and fast-packers, the Kathmandu Valley offers a hidden world of adventure. The longest and most iconic trail is the 165 km Manjushree Trail (KVR). During winter, when high-altitude Himalayan routes are closed, these trails provide ideal conditions for endurance training. The landscape includes lush forests, rolling hills, and traditional villages. Trailmandu provides expert guidance and trail markings for these routes, including connections to the Namobuddha route for extended adventures.

seo.meta_title: Fastpacking in Kathmandu Valley - Manjushree Trail | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Discover the 165km Kathmandu Valley Rim (KVR) and other winter-friendly fastpacking trails near the capital.

title: Manjushree Trail Race 2026
author: Admin
full_content: The Manjushree Trail Race 2026 is one of Nepal’s premier ultra-running events. Originally scheduled for March, the event has been postponed to April 17–19, 2026, due to national elections. The race invites runners of all levels to conquer the breathtaking trails of the Kathmandu Valley Rim (KVR). It features multiple distances, challenging athletes with steep climbs and high-altitude ridges while showcasing the cultural heritage of the valley.

seo.meta_title: Manjushree Trail Race 2026 - April Dates | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Join Nepal's premier ultra-running event on the Kathmandu Valley Rim. Updated dates for 2026.

title: The Great Himalayan Trail
author: Admin
full_content: The Great Himalayan Trail (GHT) is one of the most ambitious long-distance trails in the world, stretching the entire length of Nepal. The High Route spans 1,400–1,700 km, crossing passes up to 6,000m, while the Lower (Cultural) Route offers a village-focused experience. The current FKT (Fastest Known Time) was set by Ryan Sandes and Ryno Griesel in 25 days, 4 hours. Fast-packing the GHT involves covering 30–50 km per day with significant elevation gain, pushing even elite athletes to their limits.

seo.meta_title: The Great Himalayan Trail - Nepal's Ultimate Challenge | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: An overview of the 1,700km GHT, including fastpacking records and the differences between the High and Low routes.

title: Unveiling the Kathmandu Valley Rim (KVR)
author: Admin
full_content: KVR—the 165 km Kathmandu Valley Rim—offers hikers and runners the ultimate mix of Himalayan peaks, steep climbs, and timeless culture. The trail circumnavigates the valley, providing a panoramic view of the mountains from the ridges. It serves as the primary route for the Manjushree Trail Race and is a popular training ground for local and international ultra-runners looking for high-vertical gain close to the city.

seo.meta_title: Unveiling the Kathmandu Valley Rim (KVR) | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Explore the 165km loop around Kathmandu, featuring the best views and most challenging climbs near the city.

title: Nepal Is a Trail Runner’s Paradise
author: Admin
full_content: Nepal Is a Trail Runner's Paradise, with its diverse geography and breathtaking landscapes, is not just a destination for traditional trekking and mountaineering—it's also a prime location for trail running and endurance races. Nepal's unique geography compresses tropical forests, alpine meadows, and glaciated landscapes into short distances. This makes it possible to run through multiple ecosystems in a single day. Confirmed advantages for trail runners include thousands of kilometers of ancient foot trails, natural elevation gain perfect for endurance training, and remote villages with rich mountain culture. Iconic regions include the Kathmandu Valley Rim, Langtang & Helambu, and the Annapurna and Everest regions. Communities like Trailmandu actively develop these trails, organize events, and promote responsible mountain running.

seo.meta_title: Nepal Is a Trail Runner’s Paradise | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Discover why Nepal's diverse geography and ancient trails make it the ultimate destination for trail runners and endurance athletes.

title: Helambu Trail Running Camp
author: Admin
full_content: Helambu Trail running camp is designed for both professional and intermediate athletes to boost their trail running skills, enjoy nature, and experience trail running in the mountains. The camp spans 77 KM over 10 days with a total elevation of 6000 M. Participants experience the sighting of rare red pandas while tracking them through Shivapuri and Langtang National Parks. The route includes highlights like Pakey 360 View Point (3,500m), Magingoth, and Thadepati (3,600m). Our goal is to educate and motivate trail runners worldwide and provide them with the experience of trail running in the highlands of Nepal. The package includes licensed running guides, bag transfer services, and GPX route maps.

seo.meta_title: Helambu Trail Running Camp - Training in the Highlands | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Join Trailmandu for a 10-day immersive running camp in Helambu, featuring 6000m of elevation and rare wildlife sightings.

title: Nepal’s First Summit Challenge
author: Admin
full_content: The KVR Summit Challenge is a monthly trail running event aimed at boosting local tourism via athletics. Every month, participants take on a difficult 20–25 km circuit to one of the five tallest peaks surrounding the Kathmandu Valley. Summit challenge #1 features Bhasmasur (2,500M). The adventure kicks off in Pharping, weaving through a tranquil monastery before climbing into the Hattiban pine forest. The trail leads to Champadevi Temple, offering panoramic views of the Himalayas, before a tough climb to Bhasmasur Peak. For newcomers, we provide a 7–10 km fun run/hike that ends at the spiritual Asura Cave.

seo.meta_title: KVR Summit Challenge | Nepal’s First Summit Trail Race
seo.meta_description: A monthly trail running series challenging athletes to summit the highest peaks of the Kathmandu Valley Rim.

title: Bijay Rana Magar Wins First Backyard Ultra in Pokhara
author: Admin
full_content: Bijay Rana Magar of Team Trailmandu outlasted all competitors at the Backyard Ultra 2.0 in Pokhara. Finishing 25 loops—a total of 174 km with 5,800 m of climb—Bijay demonstrated incredible endurance and mental fortitude. The race, which follows the 'last man standing' format, saw local and international athletes pushing their limits in the hills of Pokhara. Bijay's victory marks a significant milestone for the trail running community in Nepal, highlighting the growth of ultra-endurance sports in the region.

seo.meta_title: Bijay Rana Magar Wins Backyard Ultra Pokhara | Trailmandu
seo.meta_description: Team Trailmandu's Bijay Rana Magar finishes 174km to win the first Backyard Ultra in Pokhara.
